source_rationale: CD69 is an early T/NK cell activation marker, indicating activated lymphocytes
KLRB1 (CD161) is a marker of NK cells and NKT cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector T cells and NK cells
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic granule protein characteristic of NK cells and cytotoxic T lymphocytes
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on T cells and helps distinguish memory/effector T cell subsets
CXCR4 is a chemokine receptor expressed on activated T/NK cells involved in tissue homing
Crystallin alpha A is a lens-specific protein, indicating lens epithelial or fiber cells
Crystallin beta B2 is a major structural protein of the ocular lens
HES5 is a Notch target gene involved in progenitor cell maintenance in the eye
CTGF is expressed in lens epithelial cells and involved in lens development
SLN (sarcolipin) expression combined with crystallins suggests a lens fiber cell identity
ECM1 encodes an extracellular matrix glycoprotein expressed in ocular tissues
CD74 (HLA class II invariant chain) is a hallmark of antigen-presenting B cells
MHC class II molecule highly expressed on B cells and antigen-presenting cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell lineage marker
Immunoglobulin J chain is expressed in B cells transitioning to antibody-secreting cells
SAMSN1 is a B cell-associated adaptor protein involved in B cell signaling
KRT3 is a cornea-specific keratin expressed in differentiated corneal epithelial cells
KRT12 is the corneal epithelium-specific keratin, a definitive marker of corneal epithelium
MAL is expressed in differentiated epithelial cells including corneal epithelium
ADIRF is expressed in differentiated corneal epithelial cells
HES5 is a Notch pathway gene involved in corneal epithelial differentiation
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in stromal fibroblasts of the eye
APOD is a lipocalin expressed in fibroblasts and stromal cells
SFRP4 is a Wnt antagonist expressed in mesenchymal/stromal fibroblasts
Fibulin-1 is an extracellular matrix protein characteristic of fibroblasts
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is expressed in ocular stromal fibroblasts
PLA2G2A is a secreted phospholipase expressed in stromal/fibroblast populations
Parvalbumin is a calcium-binding protein marking specific retinal ganglion cell subtypes
ONECUT2 is a transcription factor essential for retinal ganglion and horizontal cell development
Glutamate receptor AMPA type subunit 4 is expressed in retinal neurons
Contactin-associated protein 2 is a neuronal cell adhesion molecule in retinal neurons
NDRG4 is a neuron-enriched gene expressed in retinal ganglion cells
Na+/K+ ATPase beta-1 subunit is highly expressed in retinal neurons
MEG3 is a long non-coding RNA expressed in retinal progenitor/neuronal cells
NFKBIZ is an NF-kB inhibitor involved in immediate-early gene responses
COX-2 (PTGS2) is an immediate-early gene suggesting activated or stressed cells
FOSB is an immediate-early gene transcription factor indicating recently activated neurons
CTTNBP2 is a neuron-specific cytoskeletal protein suggesting neuronal identity
Dopachrome tautomerase is a melanogenic enzyme specific to melanocytes
PMEL (gp100) is a melanosome structural protein and definitive melanocyte marker
Tyrosinase-related protein 1 is a melanogenic enzyme specific to melanocytes
MLANA (Melan-A) is a melanocyte differentiation antigen and classic melanocyte marker
MITF is the master transcription factor for melanocyte lineage specification
Matrix Gla protein is expressed in ocular stromal/keratocyte cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan characteristic of corneal keratocytes/stromal cells
ANGPTL7 is highly expressed in corneal keratocytes and trabecular meshwork
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is expressed in corneal keratocytes
IGFBP5 is expressed in stromal keratocytes of the cornea
TIMP1 is a matrix metalloproteinase inhibitor expressed in corneal stromal cells
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine highly expressed by activated macrophages
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is a macrophage-derived inflammatory chemokine
SPP1 (osteopontin) is expressed by activated macrophages and microglia
IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by activated macrophages
IL8 (CXCL8) is a neutrophil-attracting chemokine produced by macrophages
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain expressed on macrophages and dendritic cells
MHC class II alpha chain is a hallmark of professional antigen-presenting cells
MHC class II DP alpha chain expressed on dendritic cells and macrophages
MHC class II DP beta chain expressed on antigen-presenting cells
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is expressed by myeloid cells including monocytes and dendritic cells
S100A9 (calgranulin B) is a myeloid cell marker co-expressed with S100A8
CD74 is highly expressed on dendritic cells and other antigen-presenting cells
TFAP2B is a transcription factor essential for amacrine cell development in the retina
PAX6 is a master eye development transcription factor expressed in retinal amacrine cells
TFAP2A is a transcription factor marking amacrine and horizontal cells in the retina
CART peptide is a neuropeptide expressed in specific amacrine cell subtypes
CELF4 is an RNA-binding protein expressed in retinal neurons including amacrine cells
MEG3 is a lncRNA highly expressed in retinal neurons
Clusterin is highly expressed in Müller glial cells of the retina
Glutamine synthetase is the canonical marker of retinal Müller glia
Vimentin is an intermediate filament protein characteristic of Müller glia
Transferrin is expressed by Müller glial cells in the retina
Glutathione peroxidase 3 is expressed in Müller glia for oxidative stress protection
HES1 is a Notch target gene maintaining Müller glial cell identity
Cellular retinoic acid binding protein 1 is involved in retinoid metabolism in Müller glia
Kainate glutamate receptor subunit 1 is expressed in retinal bipolar/amacrine interneurons
AMPA glutamate receptor subunit 2 is expressed in retinal interneurons
PCP4 is a calmodulin-binding protein expressed in retinal neurons
CADPS is involved in dense-core vesicle exocytosis in neurons
GSG1 is expressed in retinal neurons, particularly OFF bipolar cells
Inward rectifier potassium channel expressed in specific retinal neuron subtypes
Metabotropic glutamate receptor 6 is the definitive marker of ON bipolar cells in the retina
PCP2 (L7) is a Purkinje cell protein also expressed in retinal ON bipolar cells
G protein gamma 13 subunit is specifically expressed in ON bipolar cells
TRPM1 is the transduction channel of ON bipolar cells, essential for ON pathway signaling
BCAT1 is expressed in retinal ON bipolar cells
Dopachrome tautomerase indicates melanin-producing cells, likely ciliary body epithelium
PAX6 is expressed in iris/ciliary body pigmented epithelium
TFPI2 is expressed in pigmented epithelial cells of the eye
DAPL1 is expressed in pigmented epithelial cells
TRPM3 is a cation channel expressed in ciliary body/iris pigmented epithelium
PCP4 is expressed in pigmented epithelial cells of the ciliary body
TFPI2 is highly expressed in retinal pigment epithelium (RPE)
DCT is a melanogenic enzyme expressed in RPE cells
FRZB (sFRP3) is a Wnt antagonist expressed in RPE cells

Connexin 43 (GJA1) is expressed in RPE cells for gap junction communication
Clusterin is expressed in RPE cells for cytoprotection

Parvalbumin marks specific retinal ganglion cell subtypes
NDRG4 is enriched in retinal ganglion cells
MAP1A is a microtubule-associated protein expressed in ganglion cell axons
Transgelin-3 is a neuron-specific actin-binding protein in retinal ganglion cells
Ribosomal protein enrichment suggests a progenitor or highly proliferative cell population
High ribosomal gene expression indicates active translation, possibly retinal progenitor cells
Thymosin beta-4 is associated with proliferating progenitor cells
Ribosomal protein S27 enrichment supports a highly proliferative cell identity
Ribosomal protein enrichment is characteristic of actively dividing progenitor cells
PCP2 (L7) is a canonical marker of retinal ON bipolar cells, very high expression here
ISL1 is a transcription factor marking ON bipolar cells in the retina
GRM6 is the ON bipolar cell glutamate receptor, a definitive marker
PCP4 is expressed in retinal bipolar cells
SAMD5 is expressed in specific retinal bipolar cell subtypes
Rhodopsin is the definitive marker of rod photoreceptors
Rod transducin gamma subunit is specific to rod photoreceptors
Rod cyclic nucleotide-gated channel alpha 1 is specific to rod photoreceptors
Rod phosphodiesterase alpha subunit is essential for rod phototransduction
Rod phosphodiesterase gamma subunit is specific to rod photoreceptors
S-antigen (arrestin) is involved in rod phototransduction shutoff
ROM1 is a rod outer segment membrane protein specific to rod photoreceptors
Proteolipid protein 1 is the major myelin protein, marking Schwann cells/oligodendrocytes
Myelin protein zero is the major peripheral nerve myelin protein, marking Schwann cells
S100B is expressed in Schwann cells and glial cells
LGI4 is essential for Schwann cell myelination
SCN7A sodium channel is expressed in Schwann cells
GPM6B is a glycoprotein expressed in myelinating glial cells
Von Willebrand factor is a definitive endothelial cell marker
DARC (ACKR1) is a chemokine receptor expressed on vascular endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial cell-specific secreted factor
TM4SF1 is a tetraspanin enriched in vascular endothelial cells
RAMP3 is a receptor activity-modifying protein expressed in endothelial cells
IFI27 is an interferon-stimulated gene highly expressed in endothelial cells
Alpha smooth muscle actin is the canonical marker of smooth muscle cells/pericytes
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain 11 is specific to smooth muscle cells
Transgelin (SM22) is a smooth muscle cell marker
Desmin is an intermediate filament protein characteristic of smooth muscle cells
Myosin light chain kinase is essential for smooth muscle contraction
Myosin regulatory light chain 9 is expressed in smooth muscle cells
Tropomyosin 1 is a contractile protein in smooth muscle cells
ALDH3A1 is a corneal crystallin and major protein of corneal epithelium
Collagen XVII is a hemidesmosome component in basal epithelial cells
Connexin 30 is expressed in limbal/corneal epithelial cells
NQO1 is a detoxification enzyme highly expressed in corneal epithelium
TGFBI (keratoepithelin) is a corneal epithelium-associated extracellular matrix protein
MIR205HG is associated with epithelial cell identity and differentiation
Cathepsin V is expressed in corneal/limbal epithelial cells
NSG2 is a neuronal vesicle protein suggesting a neuronal cell type
NKG7 is expressed in NK cells and cytotoxic T lymphocytes
CCL5 is expressed by effector T cells and NK cells
CD69 is an early activation marker on T/NK cells
SLC5A7 is the high-affinity choline transporter in cholinergic neurons, suggesting starburst amacrine cells
RIMS1 is a synaptic vesicle protein involved in neurotransmitter release
WIF1 is a Wnt inhibitory factor expressed in trabecular meshwork and ciliary body stroma
Myocilin is highly expressed in trabecular meshwork cells of the eye
Complement factor D (adipsin) is expressed in ocular stromal cells
Endothelin-3 is expressed in ciliary body/trabecular meshwork stroma
ID1 is a BMP-responsive transcription factor in stromal/mesenchymal cells
Pleiotrophin is a growth factor expressed in ocular stromal cells
Crystallin alpha A is the major lens protein, marking lens epithelial/fiber cells
Crystallin beta B2 is a structural lens protein
Crystallin alpha B is highly expressed in lens cells
Aquaporin 1 is expressed in lens epithelial cells for water transport
CXCL14 is expressed in lens epithelial cells
SLN expression combined with crystallins supports lens cell identity
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein specific to vascular endothelial cells
Von Willebrand factor is a definitive endothelial cell marker
TM4SF1 is enriched in vascular endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor
SPARCL1 is expressed in vascular endothelial cells
IFI27 is highly expressed in endothelial cells

DAPL1 is expressed in pigmented epithelial cells of the ciliary body
Collagen IX alpha 1 is expressed in ciliary body epithelium

Collagen IX alpha 2 is expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Cone phosphodiesterase gamma subunit is specific to cone photoreceptors

Cone arrestin (X-arrestin) is specific to cone photoreceptors
Keratin 13 is expressed in non-keratinized stratified squamous epithelium (conjunctiva)
Keratin 4 is expressed in mucosal stratified squamous epithelium
Keratin 19 is expressed in conjunctival epithelial cells
